instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: IBM Sterling B2B Integrator Standard Edition 6.0.0.0 through 6.1.2.1 is vulnerable to SQL injection. A remote attacker could send specially crafted SQL statements, which could allow the attacker to view, add, modify or delete information in the back-end database.  IBM X-Force ID:  219510.
output: IBM Sterling B2B Integrator Standard Edition versions from 6.0.0.0 to 6.1.2.1 are susceptible to an SQL injection vulnerability. This flaw permits a remote attacker to execute crafted SQL commands, potentially enabling unauthorized access to view, add, modify, or delete data in the database. Associated IBM X-Force ID is 219510.
